CustomField.description: When the neighbour requested in-app deletion with the default grace window. User.IsActive is flipped immediately, but the data scrub waits until Grace_Window_Days__c (default 30) have elapsed so the neighbour can restore the account via the email magic link. Null if no grace pending. FimbyGraceExpiryBatch flips Deactivation_Requested__c=true once this date is past.
CustomField.label: Grace Started At
